assertions.title: First protected runtime request resolves to caller's VM

steps.action: Check deployed vmctl version on node-b
steps.expected: vmctl exposes /internal/vmctl/resolve endpoint
steps.observed: vmctl service returns 404 for all /internal/vmctl/* routes

steps.action: Verify git commit of deployed binary
steps.expected: Deployed version matches latest VM implementation
steps.observed: Deployed: 032ae6c9b60354fcc18bbc9d47e3312945879a66, Latest: 4b0233cedca107b3119453d7d30feee02f1fcfae

assertions.title: No static host sandbox fallback - proxy routes to VM

steps.action: Test proxy health endpoint for vmctl routing status
steps.expected: Proxy reports 'vmctl_routing: enabled' in health response
steps.observed: Proxy health returns: {"status":"ok","service":"proxy"} - no vmctl_routing field

steps.action: Check proxy service environment for VMCTL_URL
steps.expected: PROXY_VMCTL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8083
steps.observed: Environment not visible in systemctl status - likely not configured

evidence.network: GET http://localhost:8082/health -> 200 OK (no vmctl routing field)

assertions.issues: Proxy service may be missing PROXY_VMCTL_URL environment variable. Requires service config update and redeploy.

assertions.title: Crash recovery avoids duplicate canonical effects

steps.expected: Recovery increments epoch (fresh boot), resume keeps epoch
steps.observed: Local test PASS: recovery -> new_epoch=3 (fresh-boot), hibernate/resume -> same epoch=2

steps.action: Verify epoch tracking prevents duplicate effects
steps.expected: Epoch change signals callers not to retry in-flight work
steps.observed: Epoch is monotonically increasing; logged as 'new_epoch' on recovery vs 'same-epoch' on resume

frictions.description: Deployed vmctl binary on node-b predates VM implementation - git commit mismatch
Guest images not built or deployed on node-b - missing /var/lib/go-choir/guest/ directory
vmctl service missing required environment variables for Firecracker integration

blockers.description: Node B is running older go-choir deployment (commit 032ae6c9) that predates the VM ownership registry and Firecracker integration (commit 4b0233c). The vmctl service is in host-process sandbox mode and does not expose /internal/vmctl/* routes.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified local implementation via comprehensive unit tests (all PASS). Cannot deploy to node-b as that requires CI/CD pipeline execution.

blockers.description: Firecracker guest images need to be built via Nix and deployed to /var/lib/go-choir/guest/ on node-b. The nix/guest-image.nix is configured but images have not been produced.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - requires Nix build on Linux/x86_64 host

summary: All 17 assigned assertions are BLOCKED pending deployment to node-b. The VM ownership registry, Firecracker integration, and guest image infrastructure have been implemented (verified via comprehensive local unit tests: 38 vmctl tests PASS, 14 vmmanager tests PASS, 31 proxy tests PASS including 8 VM-specific routing tests). However, node-b is running an older deployment (commit 032ae6c9 from April 10) that predates the VM implementation (commit 4b0233c from April 11). To validate on node-b, the following deployment steps are required: (1) Build guest images: 'nix build .#guest-image', (2) Deploy kernel and rootfs to /var/lib/go-choir/guest/ on node-b, (3) Update go-choir-vmctl.service with Firecracker env vars (VM_FIRECRACKER_BIN, VM_KERNEL_IMAGE, VM_ROOTFS_IMAGE, VM_STATE_DIR, VM_HOST_BASE_PORT), (4) Update go-choir-proxy.service with PROXY_VMCTL_URL, (5) Restart services.
